final:
// I2C Slave Interface
module RefModule(
    input wire signed [31:0] a,
    input wire signed [31:0] b,
    input wire [1:0] op,
    input wire ready,
    output reg signed [31:0] result
);always @(*) begin
        if (ready) begin
            case (op)
                2'b00: result = a + b; // addition
                2'b01: result = a - b; // subtraction
                2'b10: result = a * b; // multiplication
                2'b11: result = a / b; // division
            endcase
        end
    end
endmodule
